description:
Add resilient App Router states for public and authenticated product routes.

**Scope**
- Implement error, not-found, loading, retry, and provider-maintenance states for onboarding, dashboard, billing, and account surfaces.
- Include patient-safe messaging for MDI or Stripe temporary failures without exposing internal provider details.
- Reuse existing design-system primitives and avoid marketing-style cards on operational screens.

**Acceptance**
- Route-level errors render a calm recovery path on mobile and desktop.
- MDI unavailable and billing unavailable states have distinct user-facing copy.
- Intake/MDI retry states do not preserve questionnaire answers after a completed submit-to-MDI handoff.
- No error state logs PHI or questionnaire payloads.
title: Product error, 404, loading, and maintenance routes
